_meta.review_notes: SNS Balance not triggered (SNS not switched). Vagus Support must go FIRST, then Vagus Trauma after that if insufficient. HRV baroreceptor sensitivity is AVERAGE (not high) → CSF Support NOT triggered. X-39 on Day 1 (protein in urine). 5 Levers grouped together in Phase 2. D-Ribose NOT indicated — Theta/Alpha ratio is 1.8:1 (needs >= 2.5:1).

protocol_order_rules.vagus: Vagus Support FIRST, then Vagus Trauma only if Support insufficient
protocol_order_rules.phase2_five_levers_together: Pineal Support, Leptin Resist, Pit A Support, Pars Intermedia — all grouped in Phase 2

corrections.sns_balance: Do NOT trigger SNS Balance — SNS is not switched for this patient
corrections.vagus_order: Vagus Support BEFORE Vagus Trauma. Never Vagus Trauma first.
corrections.csf_support: Baroreceptor sensitivity is AVERAGE → CSF Support NOT triggered. Only trigger CSF Support when baroreceptor sensitivity is explicitly HIGH.
corrections.x39_timing: X-39 on Day 1 (protein in urine is a reason to start immediately)
corrections.phase_grouping: Keep 5 Levers together in Phase 2 (Pineal, Leptin Resist, Pit A, Pars Intermedia), rest to Phase 3
corrections.no_snb_balance: SNS Balance only if SNS is clearly switched; it is not here

cytolower_gate_reason: VCS 8/32; must address Leptin before MSH
week4_retest: Retest deep breathing PNS response — if now improves, transition from Vagus Trauma to Vagus Support
